name: Amazing Weekend - Search and Relax Collector's Edition
short_description: Escape on an ideal weekend! Enjoy hidden object puzzles, mini-games, hiking, and relaxation. The perfect way to de-stress and get inspired!
detailed_description:
Immerse yourself in the perfect weekend, filled with adventure and relaxation!

This project is your personal haven of peace and inspiration. Forget the daily hustle and bustle and embark on an amazing journey where a variety of unique and engaging mini-games, hidden-object puzzles, and much more await you!

  • Rich and Diverse Gameplay: Enjoy a multitude of unique mini-games and test your skills in exciting hidden-object puzzles.

  • Progress and Exploration: Complete games to unlock new levels and explore interesting locations. You can look forward to hiking, horseback riding, boating, and serene relaxation throughout an entire weekend!

  • The Perfect Way to Relax: This is not just a game, but an incredible new way to relieve stress, find inner balance, and recharge your creative energy.

Special Collector's Edition

  • Additional Levels to Explore: Explore a full twelve new levels, packed with hidden objects and mini-games!

  • A Collection of Inspiring Wallpapers: Download beautiful desktop wallpapers to start every day of the week with inspiration.

  • Exclusive Music Player: Take the sounds of your adventure with you! Listen to the game's soundtrack anytime with a special music player.

  • Trophy and Souvenir Room: Visit a special shop to view all the trophies and souvenirs you've earned over your weekend, and relive the pleasant memories.

Treat yourself to the perfect escape from reality and find your own way to relax and get inspired!
